productName: Super Fog - Fire - Jefe Plus - 1g (1pk) - Blueberry Space Cake - IND - Sweet
description: This indica disposable carries Blueberry Space Cake in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Simple, smooth, portable, with notes of blueberry, berry, and butter, leading into settle-in, melt-into-the-couch ease.
